Year: The year when the sales territories were reorganized
Month: The month when the sales territories were reorganized
Person_Responsible: The person who oversaw the reorganization of sales territories
Number_of_Territories_Redistributed: The number of sales territories that were redistributed
Geographic_Coverage_Improvement: Whether the redistribution improved geographic coverage or not
Travel_Time_Reduction_Percentage: The percentage reduction in travel time achieved due to the redistribution of sales territories
